title: BEM-895 autonomous loop
objective:
Run script:
"""
Path('governance/autonomy').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/tools').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/reports').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

loop_state = {
  'status':'active',
  'name':'autonomous_execution_loop',
  'uses':'SENDING_CONTOUR_READY',
  'cycle_steps':['read readiness','select next pending item','route by dispatch contour','deliver to worker inbox','wait for result proof','update backlog and context'],
  'safety_rules':['RULE-011','RULE-012'],
  'operator_gate':'only strategic decisions, blockers, or scope expansion'
}
Path('governance/state/autonomous_execution_loop.json').write_text(json.dumps(loop_state, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

next_backlog = {
  'status':'ready',
  'source':'BEM-895 after SENDING_CONTOUR_READY',
  'items':[
    {'id':'BEM-895-001','title':'Persist autonomous loop state and runner tool','owner':'WRK-C1','status':'completed'},
    {'id':'BEM-895-002','title':'Add next-task selector for pending executable backlog','owner':'WRK-C1','status':'completed'},
    {'id':'BEM-896-001','title':'Add policy gate for strategic/blocker/scope-expansion tasks','owner':'WRK-C2','status':'pending'},
    {'id':'BEM-897-001','title':'Add report packaging for each autonomous cycle','owner':'WRK-C3','status':'pending'},
    {'id':'BEM-898-001','title':'Add repository health dashboard state','owner':'WRK-C1','status':'pending'}
  ]
}
Path('governance/autonomy/NEXT_EXECUTABLE_BACKLOG.json').write_text(json.dumps(next_backlog, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

selected = None
for item in next_backlog['items']:
    if item.get('status') == 'pending':
        selected = item
        break
selection = {'status':'selected' if selected else 'empty','selected':selected,'reason':'first pending item in NEXT_EXECUTABLE_BACKLOG'}
Path('governance/autonomy/next_task_selection.json').write_text(json.dumps(selection, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

if selected:
    dispatch = {'dispatch_id':'DSP-' + selected['id'], 'task_id':selected['id'], 'target_contour':selected['owner'], 'message_type':'task', 'payload_ref':'governance/autonomy/NEXT_EXECUTABLE_BACKLOG.json', 'status':'queued'}
    q = Path('governance/dispatch/dispatch_queue.jsonl')
    existing = q.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if q.exists() else ''
    existing += json.dumps(dispatch, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n'
    q.write_text(existing, encoding='utf-8')

tool = '''# BEM-895 autonomous next task selector
import json
from pathlib import Path
backlog = json.loads(Path("governance/autonomy/NEXT_EXECUTABLE_BACKLOG.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
selected = None
for item in backlog.get("items", []):
    if item.get("status") == "pending":
        selected = item
        break
print(json.dumps({"selected": selected}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
raise SystemExit(0)
'''
Path('governance/tools/select_next_autonomous_task.py').write_text(tool, encoding='utf-8')

errors = []
if not Path('governance/state/sending_contour_readiness.json').exists():
    errors.append('sending contour readiness missing')
else:
    ready = json.loads(Path('governance/state/sending_contour_readiness.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8')).get('status')
    if ready != 'SENDING_CONTOUR_READY':
        errors.append('sending contour not ready: ' + str(ready))
if not selected:
    errors.append('no pending next task selected')
status = 'PASS' if not errors else 'FAIL'
Path('governance/reports/BEM895_AUTONOMOUS_LOOP.md').write_text('# BEM-895 Autonomous execution loop\n\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nSelected next task: ' + (selected.get('id') if selected else 'none') + '\n\nErrors: ' + (', '.join(errors) if errors else 'none') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM895_AUTONOMOUS_LOOP_' + status + '.md')
marker.write_text('# BEM-895 autonomous loop proof\nStatus: ' + status + '\nSelected: ' + (selected.get('id') if selected else 'none') + '\nErrors: ' + (', '.join(errors) if errors else 'none') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/autonomous_execution_loop.json','governance/autonomy/NEXT_EXECUTABLE_BACKLOG.json','governance/autonomy/next_task_selection.json','governance/dispatch/dispatch_queue.jsonl','governance/tools/select_next_autonomous_task.py','governance/reports/BEM895_AUTONOMOUS_LOOP.md',str(marker)])
ops_applied.append('BEM895 autonomous execution loop ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
